data.body:
COMPLETION EVIDENCE (all ACs met; prior verifier verdict was a false-absence hallucination — the strings ARE present at HEAD).

The change LANDED: Gerrit change 827 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/827) is MERGED. It replicated to origin/main as commit d8c2dbb0dcb6db466b7e2de055a1bae23943eb6e ("docs: document post-merge close discipline — fast-forward your worktree, not the shared checkout"). Both gates were green before Submit: LLM-Review +1 AND Verified +1, 0 unresolved comments.

AC1 — AGENTS.md (verified at HEAD=d8c2dbb0d):
  `grep -n 'merge --ff-only origin/main' AGENTS.md` -> line 156
  `grep -ni 'shared main checkout' AGENTS.md`       -> line 157
  New bullet under the "Git workflow — land changes THROUGH GERRIT" section (AGENTS.md:152-159): "After the change MERGES, fast-forward YOUR worktree before you close ... git fetch origin && git merge --ff-only origin/main ... NEVER fast-forward, reset, or stash the shared main checkout ... Advance your own worktree (or a throwaway worktree at origin/main) instead."

AC2 — CONTRIBUTING.md (verified at HEAD):
  `grep -n 'merge --ff-only origin/main' CONTRIBUTING.md` -> line 185
  `grep -ni 'shared main checkout' CONTRIBUTING.md`        -> line 190
  `grep -n '2f\.' CONTRIBUTING.md`                          -> line 181 (new "### 2f. After merge — fast-forward your worktree, THEN close the ticket", inserted immediately after §2e Submit).

AC3 — ZERO code changes: `git diff --name-only HEAD~1 HEAD` -> AGENTS.md, CONTRIBUTING.md (only Markdown; no src/rebar path).

AC4 — pre-commit gate: `make lint` exits 0 (ruff check + format-check pass; 1086 files formatted; zizmor/actionlint clean).

AC5 [operator-attested] — MERGED via Gerrit (change 827, both votes +1, Submit -> MERGED, commit d8c2dbb0d on origin/main). The ticket is being closed from the FAST-FORWARDED worktree /Users/joeoakhart/cal-closedocs (its HEAD was advanced to origin/main = d8c2dbb0d, the merged commit, so the rebar-ticket: trailer is reachable from HEAD). The SHARED main checkout /Users/joeoakhart/rebar was NOT fast-forwarded, reset, stashed, or otherwise touched at any point — dogfooding exactly the discipline this change documents.
